Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant and Cross-Complainant John R. Tozzi's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions, Waiver Of Objections, And For Sanctions is granted as it seeks an order waiving objections and for sanctions. The order is denied as it seeks an order deeming requests for admissions admitted. The failure timely to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $966.25, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant John Tozzi, Georgene Tossi's Motion To Compel Responses and Further Responses To Discovery is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the late and incomplete responses were a misuse of the discovery process. APPEARANCES - ATTY. JODY A. MEISEL, TEL. NO. 563-2688 FOR THE PLAINTIFF ANGELA ALIOTO;
